subtitle: Unlocking the Power of Your Data Platform
speaker_notes: Welcome everyone. Today we'll walk through how Snowflake can transform your data workflows.
Here's what we'll cover today. Each section maps to a specific pain point we've heard from your team.

title: Why We Are Here
subtitle: Your data platform is modern. Is your team getting full value from it?
body: Your engineering team has built a strong foundation on Snowflake. But business users still depend on the data team for every question. Self-service analytics can unlock your investment and free your engineers to focus on platform work.
speaker_notes: Frame this around their pain: the data team is a bottleneck, business users wait days for answers.
Transition: Let's look at what self-service looks like in practice.

title: Before and After: Data Access
left_body: Business user has a question. Opens a ticket or Slacks the data team. Waits 2-5 days for a query to be written. Gets a static result that raises more questions. Repeat the cycle.
right_body: Business user has a question. Opens Snowsight or Cortex Code. Types their question in natural language. Gets an instant, governed answer. Explores follow-up questions independently.
speaker_notes: The before/after contrast is powerful. Show the time savings and the autonomy gained.

title: Key Takeaways
col1_body: Your Snowflake platform is built. Self-service analytics unlocks it for every team.
col2_body: Semantic Views eliminate metric ambiguity across regions and channels.
col3_body: Snowflake Intelligence puts natural language access in every team member's hands.
speaker_notes: Reinforce the three pillars. Each maps to a specific business outcome.
Open the floor for questions. Reference specific next steps discussed during the demo.
